title: Snapchat limits users under 16 to sharing Spotlights with friends
snippet: Users under 16 years old will get a separate profile to show Stories and Spotlight posts to friends that they follow back.

title: Why everyone’s an energy company now
snippet: Electricity demand from AI data centers is pushing everyone — including automakers like GM and Ford — into the energy storage business.

title: Avalanche’s desktop fusion reactor delivers blistering-hot plasma
snippet: Fusion power startup Avalanche Energy said its reactor prototype heated a plasma to over 10 million degrees C.
